notes:
Ember 1.2.5

• The first-run setup tour now covers everything: a new optional "Connect Gmail" step (so newcomers can hook up inbox organising + email right away with a Google App Password), and a closing "what you can ask Ember to do" summary — control your computer, organise Gmail, set timers, AI antivirus, work offline, and talk to it.

Includes 1.2.4's Gmail organising, 1.2.3's self-update fix + AI safe-open guard, and the 1.2.1/1.2.2 fixes.
